issues.detail: Instructions focus on happy path deployment without covering error handling or edge cases.
Install script fetched via curl without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: CLI deploy from Git with secret-backed env
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses koyeb secret create then references it via --env DATABASE_URL=@database-url and includes the exact --git-build-command / --git-run-command flags from the skill; baseline guesses flag names and inlines the database URL.

scenarios.name: Declarative koyeb.yaml with multi-region autoscaling
scenarios.rationale: Treatment matches the skill's exact koyeb.yaml schema (scaling.targets with metric/value, health_checks with healthy_threshold/unhealthy_threshold, regions list); baseline invents field names that do not exist in the documented format.
